content: string_downcase  Table of contents Prototype: string_downcase(data) Return type: string Description: Returns data in lower case. Arguments: data : string - Input string - in the range: .* Example: code body common control { bundlesequence => { "example" }; } bundle agent example { vars : " downcase " string => string_downcase ( "ABC" ); # will contain "abc" reports : "downcased ABC = $(downcase) " ; } Output: code R: downcased ABC = abc History: Introduced in CFEngine 3.6 See also: string_upcase() .
